name: Evan Tumba
message:
Hi, my name is Evan. I’m currently working at Capita in customer support, where I manage customer orders, invoices, and payments, and resolve issues related to internet, TV, and mobile services. I also collaborate closely with IT teams to troubleshoot technical problems and ensure quick resolution.

Before that, I worked in customer service at Herbalife and Autodoc, handling order management, invoicing, and complaints through SAP, while also supporting CRM process improvements.

I hold a Master’s in Business Administration and have a finance background, which helps me approach customer issues with strong analytical and business thinking.

Right now, I’m looking for a role where I can combine customer support and technical problem-solving, and contribute to a team focused on delivering a high-quality customer experience.”
